title: vantanea compacta subsp. microcarpa
intro: Vantanea compacta subsp. microcarpa, also known as the microcarpous Vantanea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Vantanea compacta subsp. microcarpa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
